name: Tiexi District
overview: "Tiexi District" documents the last day of the great socialist experiment, a sorrowful afternoon marked by scattered dishes and a sense of desolation. Looking at the impact of the decline of heavy industry on workers and their families in the Tiexi district of Shenyang, China, at the turn of the 21st century, documented unflinchingly by a fly-on-the-wall camera.

trailers.title: Tie Xi Qu: West of the Tracks (2002) - Wang Bing [ENG SUB -  BEST QUALITY]
